name: Amoxicillin
description: Broad-spectrum aminopenicillin antibiotic. Oral prophylactic antibiotic for wound infection. Part of TCCC combat pill pack for wound prophylaxis in non-severe injuries.
indications: Wound infection prophylaxis (mild-moderate wounds, oral pill pack)
dose: 500 mg PO every 8 hours x 7 days (wound prophylaxis). 875 mg PO every 12 hours alternative.
window: Begin within 3 hours of injury for wound prophylaxis.
warnings: If penicillin allergic: substitute doxycycline 100mg PO BID.
Oral route only -- use IV antibiotics (cefazolin/ciprofloxacin) for severe wounds or if oral not tolerated.

pediatric.dose: 25-45 mg/kg/day divided q8h (max 500 mg/dose). Use weight-based Broselow reference.

obstetric.note: Safe in pregnancy. Preferred over doxycycline (which is contraindicated in pregnancy).

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
